vocab.example: I'm definitely not a fan of any gas guzzler; I much prefer electric cars that are kinder to the environment.

vocab.meaning: những tính năng phụ trợ hào nhoáng (nhưng không quá cần thiết)
vocab.example: I gravitate towards modern luxury sedans that come with all the latest bells and whistles, like seat massagers and AI assistants.
I am captivated by Tesla models because their battery technology is truly state of the art.

vocab.meaning: vật/xe bền bỉ, làm việc hiệu quả (ngựa thồ)
vocab.example: For my daily commute, I like a reliable Japanese hatchback—a real workhorse that never breaks down.

vocab.meaning: dòng cao cấp nhất, xịn nhất
vocab.example: If money were no object, I’d love to own a top of the line Range Rover for its sheer presence on the road.

vocab.meaning: được chế tạo để bền vững với thời gian
vocab.example: I admire vintage Mercedes cars because they were built to last, unlike some modern vehicles that feel quite flimsy.

vocab.meaning: những thứ tốt nhất, tinh túy nhất
vocab.example: When it comes to performance, Italian supercars are widely considered the cream of the crop by enthusiasts.

vocab.meaning: có sức mạnh ấn tượng (thường dùng cho động cơ nhỏ nhưng mạnh)
vocab.example: I like 'hot hatches'—small cars that pack a punch and are incredibly fun to drive around tight corners.

vocab.meaning: vượt mức mong đợi (nỗ lực hơn bình thường)
vocab.example: I appreciate brands like Volvo because they go the extra mile to ensure passenger safety in every model.

vocab.meaning: tầm trung, bình dân, không có gì nổi trội
vocab.example: I don't need anything flashy; a middle of the road family SUV is perfectly fine for my lifestyle.
